label: Cult of the Unbroken
description: Not a single organization, but a catch-all term for all radical, militant, and unsanctioned expressions of devotion to Xanthia the Everliving. The Cult encompasses prayer cells, zealot warbands, necromantic cabals, fireband preachers, and everything in between—unified only by rejection of conventional authority and absolute faith in Xanthia's divinity. The Faith of the Everliving officially disavows such movements: "We cannot control what zealous believers do in their conviction." This deniability is the Cult's greatest strength. A Cult cell might range from a dozen devout followers sharing rites in secret to a militarized crusade commanding thousands of undead. Local expressions adapt theology to regional culture: orcish Cult cells emphasize eternal strength and conquest; human Cult cells promise escape from mortality; some focus purely on necromantic study. What unites them is the doctrine that undeath is apotheosis—transcendence over weakness—and that Xanthia's will supersedes all earthly law. Individual cells operate autonomously, creating cascading destabilizations the Faith of the Everliving's diplomatic corps can deny orchestrating. Some Cult manifestations receive covert support from other actors (including, possibly, sympathetic members of the official Faith). Others are purely grassroots fanaticism. The distinction becomes meaningless: the Cult destabilizes regions, and the Faith arrives later as savior offering order through submission to Xanthia.

role.label: Penitent Seeker
role.prerequisites: Submitted to a Cult cell's initiation rite; sworn oath before a priestess, war-shaman, or local zealot leader.
description: Receives indoctrination in Xanthian theology adapted to local culture
Participates in ritual gatherings, prayer circles, and communion rites
May consume ashes of honored deceased or witness resurrection ceremonies
Receives first ritual marks: tattoos, scarification, or brands marking covenant with Xanthia

role.label: Scarred Initiate
role.prerequisites: Demonstrated zeal and commitment; completed dangerous tasks or warfare for the cell; bear ritual scarification as proof of devotion.
description: Lead small groups (1d4 other Cult members or recently converted followers)
Assist in resurrection rites and necromantic ceremonies
Wear bone-marked armor or ritual vestments identifying you as committed Cult member
Understand practical necromancy fundamentals; assist with binding and control of undead

role.label: Zealot Knight
role.prerequisites: Victory in ritual combat or tests of faith; orchestrated recruitment or military success for your cell; demonstrated necromantic aptitude.
description: Command a sizeable warband (2d6 devoted followers, mix of undead and living zealots)
Requisition ritual implements, bone armor, and spiritual weapons
Perform advanced reanimation rites; raise fallen believers mid-battle
Authority to execute heretics and forcibly convert prisoners through display of Xanthia's power

role.label: Ritual Keeper
role.prerequisites: Master of necromantic ceremonies; maintained permanent ritual site; trained others in resurrection protocols and Xanthian rites.
description: Design and oversee large-scale necromantic ceremonies
Maintain sacred sites: mass graves, altars, places of power
Resurrect fallen champions with enhanced vitality; preserve consciousness across undeath
Access to elder texts and secret doctrines; interpret Xanthia's will to your cell
Lead mass conversion campaigns; baptize entire towns through spectacle and revelation

role.label: War Priest
role.prerequisites: Led your cell through military campaigns of regional significance; established unquestionable dominion over multiple settlements or warbands; mastery of both theology and necromantic warfare.
description: Command an entire crusader network (4d6+ militant devotees, substantial undead forces)
Negotiate with external powers as a representative of Xanthian will
Wear ceremonial armor, ritual masks, and carry symbols of Xanthia's authority
Perform resurrection ceremonies that preserve the personalities and memories of major figures
Shape theology for your region; reinterpret scripture to suit local culture

role.label: Shadow Inquisitor
role.prerequisites: Invitation only; recognized by the highest echelons of Xanthian devotion as a chosen instrument of her will; mastery over necromancy, theology, and the art of making others believe.
description: Operate autonomously across sectors; coordinate between cells while maintaining plausible independence
Authority to reshape theology and purge heresy in the name of Xanthia's vision
Access to forbidden rites; whispers of immortality or lichdom as ultimate reward
No cell controls you; you answer only to Xanthia herself
